title: danthonia linkii
intro: Danthonia linkii, also known as Link's danthonia, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Danthonia linkii include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Danthonia linkii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
